summary: QC Weekly Review 2026-04-07: Quality Score 5/10. 2 von 4 Reports vorhanden (Security ✅, Builder ✅, Data ❌, Research ❌). Kritische Issues: 6 API Keys ausstehend (Security), Backup 42h alt (Builder), 2 fehlende Reports. Sofortmaßnahmen: Data Manager + Research Status klären, API Key Rotation starten, Backup ausführen.
